{{Quote|As it happens, Calius is one of the few places in Imperial space where I'm perfectly safe. The Berchestian governor and I have known each other for several years. More to the point, there are certain items important to him which only I can supply.|[[Talon Karrde]] to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="TLC">''[[The Last Command]]''</ref>}}
'''Calius saj Leeloo''', also known as the '''City of Glowing Crystal''',<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Scavenging|Calius saj Leeloo}}</ref> was a major tourist attraction on [[Berchest/Legends|Berchest]] during the days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] most populous [[City/Legends|city]].<ref name="TLC" />

==History==
The city was carved by the native [[Berchestian]]s, entirely from one massive [[Crystal/Legends|crystal]], which was created over the centuries from the [[Salt/Legends|salt]] deposits of the adjacent [[Leefari Sea]]. Being an architectural and beautiful masterpiece, it was included in the list of the [[Twenty Wonders of the Galaxy]] by the historian [[Vicendi]] in [[10,000 BBY]].<ref name="EA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref>

During the conflict with the [[Eternal Empire]], Calius saj Leeloo was the capital city of [[Berchest/Legends|Berchest]].<ref name="Mission" />

In [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], during the [[Separatist Crisis/Legends|Separatist Crisis]], it was rocked by a 7.1 [[Groundquake/Legends|groundquake]] on 13:3:13, centered 45 [[Kilometer/Legends|kilometers]] west of the city in the [[Mountain/Legends|mountains]]. The quake caused substantial damage, shattering homes and businesses and causing thousands to flee the city. Thousands more were estimated to have been [[Death/Legends|killed]]. The [[Spaceport/Legends|spaceport]] closed for twelve hours as a result of the quake. The [[Sanctum Arcti]], Calius's most famous structure, sustained only light damage, which was declared a miracle by the galactic media. The [[Refugee Relief Movement/Legends|Refugee Relief Movement]] sent aid and ships to the planet soon after.

Before the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], like the rest of the planet, the city based its economy on tourism. Due to the successive conflicts of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] and the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], tourists stopped coming to enjoy the city. Luckily for the Berchestians, the planet was able to leverage its position on several important [[Hyperspace route/Legends|trade routes]] and turn itself into an important trade nexus.<ref name="TLC" />
